content.en:
Xuanxu Ancestral Realm.

Ye Tian's cultivation continued to improve, and his combat power became stronger and stronger, as if there was no end.

But Ye Tian knew very well that he was almost at the peak of the top ancestor.

And even the Bone Bone Bead is not very good at improving his strength, maybe after these six bones have all the bone beads refined, then refining the Bone Bead is afraid that it will only have a one-third or even one-fifth effect.

"With my current cultivation and strength, if I refine the Bone Soldier Bone Bead, I'm afraid the effect will be minimal, right?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

This is the same as the Treasure of Annihilation, if you refine too much, it will have no effect if you continue to refine later.

This is just like ordinary people will become resistant if they take too much of a medicine, and the same is true for the ancestors.

"No matter, first refine all the six bones and bone beads, and then continue to snatch the bone beads!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Millions of years have passed, and under Ye Tian's full refining, the six bones have all been refined.

At this time, Ye Tian's strength had been greatly improved, and he was much stronger than before.

So, Ye Tian copied his body again, and broke into the forbidden land of the Sea of Bones with his copied body.

......

Forbidden Land of the Sea of Bones.

As soon as Ye Tian came in, he sensed a large amount of Bone King aura.

"Sixty Bone Kings, the Bone Clan has sent so many strong people!!

Ye Tian was surprised.

Bang!!!!

Sixty bone kings crossed over and besieged Ye Tian one after another.

In the midst of the battle, one of the Bone Kings sacrificed a bone sword.

The moment this bone sword appeared, Ye Tian felt the breath of death.

"What kind of weapon is this?"

Although Ye Tian was not panicked, he was shocked.

It didn't matter if the replica body died, the point was such a terrifying weapon, which he had never seen in the Dark Forbidden Realm.

He was sure that the Holy Ancestor and the Ancestor of Destruction definitely didn't, otherwise he would have used it the last time he dealt with him.

Once such a weapon is used, the last time he will definitely not be able to resist the Ancestor of Destruction, he will definitely be killed in an instant.

"Die, Ancestor of the Dark Forbidden Realm!"

The Bone King roared.

Rumble!!!!

The bone sword turned into a ray of light and stabbed towards Ye Tian.

At this moment, time and space were frozen, and as powerful as Ye Tian could not break the blockade of time and space, as if all forces could not resist this bone sword.

"Give me !!!"

Ye Tian roared in his heart, mobilized all his strength, and urged the ultimate ancestral technique, which broke the restraints.

However, he still couldn't dodge this bone sword.

Burst!!!!

The bone sword penetrated Ye Tian's body, but it didn't kill him, it only hit him hard.

And after performing this blow, the Bone King's breath was extremely weak, which was obviously the price of using the Bone Sword.

But at this time, Ye Tian was seriously injured and dying, and there was no way to take the opportunity to kill this bone king.

The other Bone Kings seized the opportunity and immediately attacked Ye Tian, and one of the Bone Kings withdrew from the battlefield with the weak Bone King.

After a while, Ye Tian's replica body was bombarded and killed.

......

"I didn't expect that after I became stronger, I would be killed?"

Ye Tian said speechlessly.

He also knew very well that the reason why he was killed was not because there were more than a dozen bone kings, but because of the bone sword.

It was definitely a powerful weapon used by the Supreme Ancestor at this level, and it could inflict heavy damage on him, and even the recovery type of Ancestral Skill could not recover his injuries in time.

Ye Tian didn't continue to send the copy body to the past, if there was no way to block the bone sword, no matter how many times he sent the copy body, he would not be able to obtain the bone bead, but would be killed again and again.

"Defenses must be strengthened!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He had always felt that his defense was very strong, and the two defensive ultimate ancestral skills were superimposed, but they were still pierced by the bone sword.

"Two defensive ultimate ancestral techniques can't compete with that bone sword, what if it's three or even four?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The defensive Ultimate Ancestral Skill is very easy to stack, and if it is an offensive Ultimate Ancestral Skill, it is indeed difficult to stack, or even impossible to stack.

Therefore, if he created a defensive Ultimate Ancestral Skill that could be stacked, he might be able to block the attack of that bone sword.

"In the next few years, let's work hard to create the Ultimate Ancestral Technique of Defense!"

Ye Tian decided.

He had had many experiences in creating the Ultimate Ancestral Technique, and now that his cultivation had reached such a level, the speed of creating the Ultimate Ancestral Technique was naturally faster.

According to Ye Tian's estimation, he could create at least two or three defensive ultimate ancestral techniques in a realm year.

Even if it is created in the later stage, the ultimate ancestral technique created is probably even more.

Although it costs a lot to perform the Ultimate Ancestral Technique, and the explosion of multiple Ultimate Ancestral Skills at one time will even consume a large part of the Ancestor's power, as long as he can block the blow of the Bone Sword, he can kill some Bone Generals in a short period of time.

The years passed slowly, and Ye Tian had been creating the ultimate ancestor technique of defense.

And at this time, the bone kings of the bone clan had never seen an ancestor enter the forbidden land of the bone sea, so they thought that Ye Tian had suffered a heavy loss, and it must be because the clone was killed and paid a huge price, at least for a long time, they couldn't repair it, so they breathed a sigh of relief one by one.

Over time, some of the Bone Kings returned to the Bone Clan.

In the blink of an eye, ten realm years had passed.

At this time, the bone kings of the Bone Sea Forbidden Land had already forgotten about Ye Tian's affairs.

However, no one knew how many defensive ultimate ancestral techniques Ye Tian had created in such a long time.

"Hahaha, eighteen defensive ultimate ancestral skills, but unfortunately I can't do it when I want to create defensive ultimate ancestral skills, as if some kind of power in the dark restricts me from creating defensive ultimate ancestral skills!"

Ye Tian muttered.

It was precisely because of this restriction that he had only created eighteen Ultimate Ancestral Techniques, plus the two Ultimate Defensive Ancestral Techniques that he had known before, that was a full twenty Ultimate Defensive Ancestral Techniques.

Most of the defensive Ultimate Ancestral Skills are shield-type Ultimate Ancestral Skills, and this fusion is stacked.

Now, he possessed twenty defensive ultimate ancestral skills, and even a single blow from that bone sword couldn't hurt him, not even the attacks of the Bone Kings.

If he had been using twenty defensive Ultimate Ancestral Techniques, although he would only be able to fight for a while before exhausting the power of the Ancestor, it was estimated that he would be invincible for a while.

"This time, you must get enough bone beads, or even a few bone king bone beads!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.
